subject: EMS
title: Global Economy
tagline: Explore trade, exchange rates, imports and exports!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What is an 'exchange rate'?
options: World Trade Organisation
Rand
The value of one currency compared to another
Countries becoming more connected through trade and technology
stages.correctOption: The value of one currency compared to another
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The value of one currency compared to another is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The value of one currency compared to another.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: What does 'import' mean?
options: Countries becoming more connected through trade and technology
Rand
Bringing goods into a country from abroad
Sending goods to another country to sell
stages.correctOption: Bringing goods into a country from abroad
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Bringing goods into a country from abroad is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Bringing goods into a country from abroad.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: What does 'export' mean?
options: Sending goods to another country to sell
When a country imports more than it exports
To access goods and resources they don't produce
Bringing goods into a country from abroad
stages.correctOption: Sending goods to another country to sell
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Sending goods to another country to sell is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Sending goods to another country to sell.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: What is globalisation?
options: Sending goods to another country to sell
World Trade Organisation
A tax on imported goods
Countries becoming more connected through trade and technology
stages.correctOption: Countries becoming more connected through trade and technology
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Countries becoming more connected through trade and technology is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Countries becoming more connected through trade and technology.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What is a 'trade deficit'?
options: The value of one currency compared to another
Rand
When a country imports more than it exports
A company that operates in many countries
stages.correctOption: When a country imports more than it exports
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! When a country imports more than it exports is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is When a country imports more than it exports.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: Name South Africa's currency.
options: When a country imports more than it exports
Rand
Sending goods to another country to sell
World Trade Organisation
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Rand.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: What is a multinational company?
options: Countries becoming more connected through trade and technology
A company that operates in many countries
Sending goods to another country to sell
Bringing goods into a country from abroad
stages.correctOption: A company that operates in many countries
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A company that operates in many countries is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A company that operates in many countries.

options: Bringing goods into a country from abroad
To access goods and resources they don't produce
Countries becoming more connected through trade and technology
The value of one currency compared to another

stages.correctFeedback: Yes! To access goods and resources they don't produce is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is To access goods and resources they don't produce.

options: World Trade Organisation
When a country imports more than it exports
A tax on imported goods
A company that operates in many countries
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A tax on imported goods is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A tax on imported goods.

options: When a country imports more than it exports
